criteria_results.criterion: The operator obtains the catalog schema body for a named kind via a single read-only CLI invocation that fetches and prints it — diffable locally against <substrate>/schemas/<name>.schema.json without touching node_modules.
criteria_results.evidence: pi-context read-catalog-schema --kind tasks prints the body; piped to diff against a behind installed schema it shows only the real drift, no phantom line; package-intrinsic (bundled samples), no node_modules hunt

criteria_results.criterion: The body is the verbatim catalog *.schema.json (raw JSON Schema: properties/definitions/$id), not the read-samples-catalog projection.
criteria_results.evidence: the op output diffed against samples/schemas/tasks.schema.json is byte-identical (empty diff); parses to top-level properties + $id; the test contrasts it against the projection which carries neither

criteria_results.criterion: No installed schema, block, or config is mutated by the read path.
criteria_results.evidence: readCatalogSchemaText takes one param (no cwd), reads only the bundled samplesRoot via fs.readFileSync; the op run ignores cwd; the test pins arity 1 + stable repeat reads

criteria_results.criterion: build + check + full test green; parity-check exit 0; runtime demo (fetch + local diff against a catalog-ahead substrate); fresh adversarial probe.
criteria_results.evidence: all gates 0; the tmp catalog-ahead demo (empty samples diff + drift-only installed diff); fresh probe PASS 8 vectors zero defects
this VER-044 + the verification_verifies_item edge to TASK-050 + complete-task; FGAP-079 closed in the same cascade
